chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD CP. No. D- 3377 of 2016 DATED ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 11.01.2018 For orders on office objection For orders on MA 19751/16 For katcha peshi None present for petitioner Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Addl.A.G. This petition is called for hearing; neither the petitioner nor his counsel is present and no intimation is received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing viz. 2.2.2017. It appears from the record that this petition was filed on 5.12.2016 and since then nobody on behalf of petitioner is diligently pursuing this petition. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in this petition which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE karar_hussain /PS*
